prone.name: Prone
prone.summary: +2 AC vs ranged, -2 AC vs melee. Melee attacks made while prone take -4. Standing up costs a Move action.

cover_half.name: In Cover (Half)
cover_half.summary: +2 AC vs ranged attacks. Ignored by melee.

cover_total.name: In Cover (Total)
cover_total.summary: +4 AC vs ranged attacks. Ignored by melee.

total_defense.name: Total Defense
total_defense.summary: +2 AC and immune to Shock damage for the round. Costs Main Action.

surprised.name: Surprised
surprised.summary: Cannot act normally in the first round. May only take Instant actions until initiative begins.

stunned.name: Stunned
stunned.summary: Cannot take actions. Re-roll initiative (d8) when stun ends.

mortally_wounded.name: Mortally Wounded
mortally_wounded.summary: At 0 HP from lethal damage. Must be stabilized within 6 rounds or die; further damage kills immediately.

poisoned.name: Poisoned
poisoned.summary: Physical save to resist. Onset, interval, and effects vary by toxin.

diseased.name: Diseased
diseased.summary: Physical save to resist infection. Symptoms and follow-up saves vary by disease.

acute_radiation.name: Acute Radiation
acute_radiation.summary: Failed Physical save vs high-dose exposure: lose 1 CON. Below half original CON = death in 1d6 weeks; below CON 3 = instant death.

chronic_radiation.name: Chronic Radiation
chronic_radiation.summary: Rads: 4-5 = -1 Phys checks/saves; 6-7 = -1 all checks/saves; 8-10 = -2 all checks/saves. At 10, fail daily Phys save = -1 CON.

xenoallergy.name: Xenoallergy
xenoallergy.summary: Daily Physical save while exposed. Each failure adds cumulative -1 to hit rolls and skill checks. Six failures = death.
